Name: Average time for Accepted + Assigned across all process variants containing this activity
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Accepted + Assigned and the end of the case

Name: Total time spent in Accepted + Assigned when followed by Completed + In Call compared to when followed by Completed + Resolved
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Assigned' and activity 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Minimum time for Accepted + Assigned in variants that include Completed + In Call
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity Accepted + Assigned and the end of the case

Name: Average duration of Accepted + Assigned grouped by country
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Assigned' and the end of case grouped by the last value of organization country

Name: Time from Accepted + Assigned to Completed + In Call in variants where both activities occur
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Assigned' and activity 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Elapsed time between Accepted + Assigned and the next occurrence of Accepted + In Progress
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Assigned' and activity 'Accepted + In Progress'

Name: Average time for Accepted + Assigned in variants that transition directly to Accepted + In Progress versus those that include intermediate waiting states (e.g., Accepted + Wait - User)
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Assigned' and activity 'Accepted + In Progress'

Name: Minimum time between Queued + Awaiting Assignment and Accepted + Assigned when Completed + In Call appears later in the same case
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and activity 'Accepted + Assigned'

Name: Cycle time of Accepted + Assigned when it precedes Completed + In Call within the same case
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Assigned' and activity 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Average time for Accepted + Assigned in variants that end with Completed + Closed versus those that end with Completed + In Call
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Assigned' and the end of case where activity 'Completed + Closed occurs

Name: Time from case start to Accepted + Assigned in traces that eventually perform Completed + In Call
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Assigned' and the end of case where activity 'Completed + In Call occurs

Name: Total time for Accepted + Assigned in variants containing multiple occurrences of Queued + Awaiting Assignment before Completed + In Call
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Assigned' and the end of case where activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment occurs

Name: Minimum time for Accepted + Assigned when followed within the same trace by Accepted + Wait - User and then Completed + In Call
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Assigned' and activity 'Accepted + Wait - User'
